import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
end

fn skip_ws(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  mut k = i
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut done = false
  while k < n and not done
    match string.byte_at(s, k)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        k = k + 1
      else
        done = true
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
  k
end

fn find_end(_ s: String, _ start: Int) -> Int
  mut k = start
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut done = false
  while k < n and not done
    match string.byte_at(s, k)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        done = true
      else
        k = k + 1
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
  k
end

fn tokens_equal(_ s: String, _ a: Int, _ b: Int, _ c: Int, _ d: Int) -> Bool
  string.substring(s, a, b) == string.substring(s, c, d)
end

let s = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(s)

mut best_start = 0
mut best_stop = 0
mut best_count = 0

mut i = skip_ws(s, 0)
while i < n
  let stop = find_end(s, i)
  mut j = skip_ws(s, 0)
  mut is_first = true
  while j < i
    let jstop = find_end(s, j)
    if tokens_equal(s, i, stop, j, jstop)
      is_first = false
    end
    j = skip_ws(s, jstop)
  end
  if is_first
    mut count = 0
    mut k = skip_ws(s, 0)
    while k < n
      let kstop = find_end(s, k)
      if tokens_equal(s, i, stop, k, kstop)
        count = count + 1
      end
      k = skip_ws(s, kstop)
    end
    if count > best_count
      best_count = count
      best_start = i
      best_stop = stop
    end
  end
  i = skip_ws(s, stop)
end

let tok = string.substring(s, best_start, best_stop)
println("top=#{tok}=#{best_count}")
